◎译　　名　希思维尔：摩城唱片的诞生

◎简　　介  

　　Documentary film that focuses on the period beginning with the birth of Motown in Detroit in 1958 until its relocation to Los Angeles in the early 1970s.

◎获奖情况  

　　第56届美国声音效果协会奖(2020)
　　非虚构类电视节目最佳音效(提名)
